positive: A symmetrical, minimalist representation of a cosmic forest, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and gently drifting nebulae forming abstract silhouettes. The primary subjects are elegant, organic tree-like structures with glowing, geometric leaves, centered in the frame. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep midnight blues, vibrant cyan, and ethereal electric purple accents, giving the impression of glowing against darkness. The composition should feel balanced, suitable for repeating a print pattern, with clean edges and strong definition, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets Celestial Minimalism. Cinematic, high detail, vector illustration style.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, cropped, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, poor composition
